title: Translations for Nvidium
body:
## What is Nvidium?
**Nvidium is a replacement rendering backend for Sodium that uses Nvidia only OpenGL extensions to increase FPS by a significant amount.**

## Translations for Nvidium
**Translations for Nvidium** is a resource pack that adds localization to the mod **(Nvidium)**. Number of supported languages fully depends on the community, so it will be expanded later. If your language is not supported yet, make sure to follow **Translations for Nvidium's** Modrinth page for future updates.

_All translations are manually produced by numerous contributors listed below._

## How Do I Contribute?
You can easily add translations for your native language on our [Crowdin page](https://crowdin.com/project/nvidium-fabric)!

_P.S.: If you can't see your language on a Crowdin Dashboard - DM me on Discord (@jabenya.tko)._

## Supported Languages
- **English - 100%**
- **Spanish - 32%**
- **German - 100%**
- **Ukrainian - 100%**
- **Hungarian - 100%**
- **Turkish - 100%**
- **Japanese - 100%**
- **Korean - 100%**
- **Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) - 81%**

## Credits

- Spanish - WafflelBOT
